select_devices.title: Select thermostats
select_devices.description: Choose which Mysa thermostats to add to Home Assistant. You can change this later from the integration's Configure page.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Mysa
reauth_confirm.description: Your Mysa credentials are no longer valid. Enter your password again.

init.title: Mysa options
init.description: The device list is refreshed from Mysa every hour. If a newly added thermostat is missing, wait a moment and reopen this page.
